# localOCR Project Setup

Project: Local OCR text extraction from images using EasyOCR

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Scaffold the Python project
- [x] Configure Python environment
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Create project structure and core modules
- [x] Verify setup and create README
- [x] Complete documentation

## Project Details

- **Type**: Python Project
- **Purpose**: Extract text from images using EasyOCR
- **Main Dependencies**: 
  - transformers (from git)
  - torch
  - pillow
  - other OCR-related packages

---

Progress tracking: Work through each checklist item systematically.
